segments.caption: The video opens with a black screen displaying white text: 'POV - You bought a ticket to Corgi-Cafe in Bangkok,' setting a playful, immersive tone. The scene transitions to the interior of the Corgi-Cafe, where a line of fluffy, tan-and-white corgis with perky ears and colorful collars are lying in a neat row along a concrete ledge. A man in a black t-shirt, black pants, and beige sandals approaches them, bending down to gently pet each dog in turn. He crouches to interact more closely, smiling as he strokes their heads and backs. The dogs appear calm and receptive, some lifting their heads to nuzzle his hand. The cafe has a modern, minimalist design with concrete pillars, wooden flooring, and a decorative white lattice wall. In the background, shelves display merchandise, and a sign indicates 'SNACK 100 BAHT.' As the man finishes petting the corgis, he stands and walks away, and the camera pans to reveal a wider view of the cafe. Several patrons are seated at tables, some wearing blue booties, interacting with corgis that roam freely. One man in a white shirt pets a corgi on his lap, while a woman in a light blue dress sits cross-legged, observing. The atmosphere is relaxed and joyful, with people and dogs coexisting in a cozy, pet-friendly environment.
